Squeezers. Cocktail kits. Discover everything you need to create standout BACARDÍ cocktails. SHOP NOW FAQ WANT TO KNOW MORE? How do you make rum? Rum is made using only three ingredients: molasses from sugarcane, yeast and water. Ingredients are fermented, then distilled, aged, filtered and blended.
